decks.notes: This deck focuses on quickly playing artifacts to enable powerful synergies and quickly overwhelm the opponent. By utilizing cards like Emry, Lurker of the Loch and Urza's Saga, the deck can generate value and pressure early on. The inclusion of disruptive cards like Metallic Rebuke and Unholy Heat help control the opponent's game plan while maintaining a fast pace. The key is to establish a board presence quickly and efficiently, using a combination of card advantage and tempo plays to outpace the opponent and secure a victory.

The deck focuses on utilizing artifact creatures and tokens to generate mana and card advantage while controlling the opponent's board through various spells and abilities. It aims to assemble key pieces of the combo, such as Urza, Lord High Artificer and Emry, Lurker of the Loch, to create a powerful engine that can outvalue the opponent and eventually win the game through card advantage and resource denial. The deck also utilizes cards like Mishra's Bauble and Mox Opal to help accelerate its game plan and set up its combos efficiently.

This Boros Aggro deck focuses on fast, aggressive creatures and burn spells to quickly overwhelm the opponent. The key strategy is to play efficient creatures like Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Phlage, Titan of Fire's Fury early on, while using burn spells like Galvanic Discharge and Goblin Bombardment to clear the way and finish off the opponent. The deck also includes disruption cards like Ranger-Captain of Eos and Thraben Charm to control the board and protect your threats. With a mix of creatures, burn, and disruption, this deck aims to quickly close out games before the opponent can stabilize.

The main concept of this deck is to use a combination of countermagic, card draw, and alternate win conditions to disrupt the opponent's game plan and win the game without relying on traditional lands for mana. By utilizing cards like Disrupting Shoal and Counterspell to control the game, along with cards like Lotus Bloom and Goblin Charbelcher for burst damage, the deck aims to outmaneuver opponents and secure victory through unexpected combinations and powerful spells.

The main concept of this Boros Aggro deck is to overwhelm the opponent with quick and aggressive creatures like Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Guide of Souls. Utilizing cards like Ajani, Nacatl Pariah and Goblin Bombardment for additional reach and damage. The deck also includes cards for control and protection like Ranger-Captain of Eos and Thraben Charm. The mana base consists of fetch lands to ensure consistency and cards like Arena of Glory and Elegant Parlor for additional utility. Overall, the deck aims to apply constant pressure and win the game quickly with a mix of creature aggression and burn spells.

This deck focuses on utilizing fast mana acceleration and searching abilities to quickly assemble the combo pieces necessary to win the game. By using cards like Serum Powder and Gemstone Caverns to get an early advantage, and Devourer of Destiny and Thud as the primary combo pieces, the deck aims to deal a large amount of damage in a single turn. Pact of Negation provides protection while cards like Plunge into Darkness and Summoner's Pact help to find the necessary pieces. Overall, the deck aims to quickly combo off and win the game before the opponent has a chance to react.

This deck revolves around using Ruby Medallion and other ramp spells to quickly generate mana, allowing you to cast multiple spells in a turn. Wrenn's Resolve and Glimpse the Impossible help you dig for combo pieces, while Ral, Monsoon Mage and Grapeshot provide win conditions. Past in Flames lets you recur spells from your graveyard, and Desperate Ritual and Pyretic Ritual help you generate even more mana. The goal is to combo off and deal a large amount of damage to your opponent in a single turn.

The deck focuses on quickly ramping up mana with Birthing Ritual to cast powerful creatures like Shardless Agent and Ice-Fang Coatl. The deck also includes disruptive spells like Subtlety and Sink into Stupor to control the opponent's board while also running some counter magic with Force of Negation and Flare of Denial. The creature selection includes some versatile options like Coiling Oracle and Abhorrent Oculus to provide card advantage and pressure the opponent. The deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with efficient threats and disruption while maintaining a strong mana base.

This Boros Aggro deck focuses on aggressive creature plays backed up by burn spells and disruption. The key concept revolves around efficiently utilizing low-cost creatures like Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Ocelot Pride to pressure the opponent early on. Ajani, Nacatl Pariah provides additional support and disruption with its ability to exile creatures. The deck also includes removal options like Path to Exile and Galvanic Discharge to clear the way for your creatures to keep attacking. Overall, the strategy is to overwhelm the opponent with a fast and relentless assault.

This UR Control deck focuses on disrupting opponents with counter spells, land destruction, and card draw while maintaining board control. The deck utilizes cards like Force of Negation, Boom / Bust, and Cleansing Wildfire to disrupt opponents' strategies, while also utilizing Mishra's Bauble and Soul-Guide Lantern for card advantage. Tishana's Tidebinder serves as a win condition by tapping down opponent's creatures, while Lightning Bolt provides additional removal and direct damage. The inclusion of Urza's Saga allows for tutorable artifacts to further control the game. Ultimately, this deck aims to outvalue and outmaneuver opponents to secure victory.

The deck focuses on assembling a powerful combo using cards like Lotus Bloom, Goblin Charbelcher, and Whir of Invention to quickly generate a win condition without relying on traditional lands. The strategy involves controlling the game with counterspells like Force of Negation and Disrupting Shoal, while also utilizing cards like Thundertrap Trainer and Hydroelectric Specimen to disrupt the opponent's game plan. By effectively managing resources and executing the combo efficiently, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent and secure a victory through its unconventional landless approach.

This deck focuses on fast and aggressive creature plays, supported by strong removal and protection spells. The goal is to overwhelm the opponent with a combination of strong creatures like Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Scion of Draco, while disrupting their strategy with cards like Lightning Bolt and Stubborn Denial. The deck also benefits from Leyline of the Guildpact and Leyline Binding to control the board and protect its own creatures. The inclusion of powerful mythic rare creatures like Phlage, Titan of Fire's Fury adds additional pressure to the opponent.

The deck focuses on ramping up mana quickly with Urza's lands and Mind Stone, while controlling the board with powerful Eldrazi creatures and removal spells. Ugin, Karn, and Thought-Knot Seer provide card advantage and disruption, while Devourer of Destiny and Glaring Fleshraker serve as threats that can quickly end the game. The deck also utilizes Ugin's Labyrinth and Kozilek's Command for additional control options. With the ability to generate a large amount of mana and powerful threats, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent and control the game until victory.

This deck focuses on controlling the game through counterspells, removal, and card advantage. It aims to disrupt the opponent's strategy while building towards a powerful endgame with cards like Teferi, Hero of Dominaria and Terminus. The inclusion of Kaheera as a companion adds another layer of synergy to the deck. By efficiently managing resources and strategically timing spells, the deck can outlast opponents and secure victory through its powerful control elements.

This Boros Aggro deck focuses on quickly deploying aggressive creatures like Voice of Victory and Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer to apply early pressure on the opponent. With cards like Goblin Bombardment and Galvanic Discharge, the deck can control the board and deal direct damage to help secure the win. The inclusion of powerful cards like Phlage, Titan of Fire's Fury and Ajani, Nacatl Pariah provide additional threats and ways to close out the game. The deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with a combination of creature aggression and direct damage spells.

This deck focuses on fast and aggressive gameplay, aiming to quickly overwhelm opponents with a combination of creatures and direct damage spells. It utilizes a mix of powerful creatures like Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Guide of Souls, along with burn spells like Galvanic Discharge and Goblin Bombardment to control the board and deal damage directly to the opponent. The deck also includes cards like Ajani, Nacatl Pariah and Seasoned Pyromancer for additional utility and card advantage. The mana base is carefully constructed to ensure smooth gameplay and consistent access to the deck's powerful cards.
